3. Confirm chat input visible WITHOUT login prompt

5. Engine logs (sudo grep 'service=kimi' /var/log/etap.log | tail -3): expect [APF:H2_DATA] api_path=<connect-rpc endpoint> + [APF:KEYWORD_CHECK] decoded_len=N found=1 + [APF:block_response] service=kimi size=735 http2=2 + [APF:envelope] service=kimi response_type=connect_rpc

7. NO real LLM PII analysis (no decode of 880101 as 1988-born/male)
8. WS / H2 close: clean (no 1006 cascade expected for connect_rpc + RST_STREAM normal)
